allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('NAME langs:', [n['language']['name'] for n in d['names']]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('NAME langs:', [n['language']['name'] for n in d['names']]\); print\('EFFECT langs:', [e['language']['name'] for e in d['effect_entries']]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\([n for n in d['names'] if n['language']['name'] in \('en','es'\)], indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(n['language']['name'], n['name']\) for n in d['names'] if n['language']['name'] in ['en','es']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('stats', d.get\('pokemonDetail', {}\)\), indent=2\)\)")
